name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Navy Rd Check Into Cash in Millington, TN serves residents with payday loans, title loans, and cash advances.
description_long:
Check Into Cash in Millington, TN operates from its standalone storefront at 4764 Navy Rd, serving residents throughout this Memphis-area community. The location is open Monday and Friday 9AM–7PM, Tuesday through Thursday 9AM–6PM, and Saturday 9AM–4PM. Sunday hours are closed.

At this Millington location, customers can access payday loans, title loans, and cash advances with minimal documentation. The team here specializes in quick funding decisions for residents facing immediate cash needs. Call 901-873-2274 to learn about current terms and availability.

For Millington residents, this Check Into Cash branch offers a local option when you need fast cash between paychecks. Bring a valid photo ID, proof of income, and a blank check or bank information. The store is conveniently located on Navy Rd for easy access.
pros: Same-day cash funding available if approved — walk out with money in hand
Physical store location enables in-person application and immediate service without waiting for online approval
Extended operating hours (8am-7pm most days) accommodate working schedules
Bundled services including check cashing, Western Union, bill pay, and tax preparation reduce need for multiple vendors
Multiple loan products (payday, title, installment, flex line) allow borrowers to choose terms matching their situation
Accepts check cashing for checks 'others won't accept,' suggesting more lenient policies than banks
30-year operational history indicates established company with local community relationships
cons: Payday and title loans typically carry triple-digit APRs and high fees — specific rates hidden behind state selector with no transparency upfront
Loan amounts capped at $600 for payday products, insufficient for larger emergencies
Requires active checking account and proof of income, excluding unbanked and irregular-income consumers
Product and service availability varies by location — not all services guaranteed at Ferndale store
No mention of flexible repayment options, hardship programs, or alternatives if borrower cannot repay on due date
best_for: Salaried workers with regular paychecks facing small unexpected expenses needing funds before next paycheck
Vehicle owners with clean car titles needing larger emergency cash amounts (title loan alternative)
Unbanked consumers who need check cashing and money transfer services alongside emergency lending
Borrowers in states/areas without credit union payday alternative loans (PALs) seeking fastest available option
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is appropriate for salaried employees in genuine short-term cash emergencies who need same-day funding and have an active checking account. The critical caveat: payday and title loans carry extremely high interest rates and fees; this should be a last resort after exploring payday alternatives, credit union PALs, employer advances, or negotiating with creditors, as repeat borrowing creates expensive debt cycles.
services: Installment loans with extended repayment terms
meta_description: Millington, TN Check Into Cash at 4764 Navy Rd offers fast payday loans and title loans.
seo_title: Check Into Cash in Millington, TN | CreditDoc
